title: Looking for a consultant to help setup a project and CRM
excerpt: Looking for a consultant to help setup project management with time keeping and with CRM integration

posts.author: Rmcquilter (Ryan McQuilter)
posts.cookedHtml: Looking for a consultant to help setup project management with time keeping and with CRM integration

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Rmcquilter

Welcome to the community!

At upstream , we are proud to offer our expertise as Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners, and we were recently awarded Professional Services Partner of the Year!

Our company is based in Australia, and we have a dedicated and experienced global staff network that can meet your needs. Our Solutions Engineers and full stack Development Team specialise in integrations and custom requirements, and we are confident in our ability to provide valuable support to your organisation.

To schedule a meeting, you can reach me directly at peta@upstreamtech.io or book a meeting with us through the link provided below. We look forward to discussing your objectives and finding ways to help you achieve your goals.

Chat with Peta
International Client - Special Hours

Thank you for considering upstream as your partner, and have a great day ahead!

Kind regards,
Peta

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Rmcquilter ,

Welcome to the monday community !

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out! At thespelas.com we’re an Official and Authorized monday partner with over 5 years of individual experience on the platform and extensive experience in designing and implementing customized CRM solutions that are tailored to each business’ goals.

We have a wealth of experience in creating both custom and native integrations, and can ensure that they are utilized to their fullest potential in optimizing your CRM by integrating with any other software you might use.

To add, we have also implemented extensive Project & Event Management solutions - time management features included - and can advise you to that end according to business and monday best practices.

Please do schedule a Free Consulting Session with us here so we can better discuss your vision and requirements! Alternatively, if none of the available time slots work out for you, please contact us at info@thespelas.com so we can do our best to accommodate you.

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you !

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com 1

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Rmcquilter and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

This sounds like an exciting project and I’d be happy to see how the team at CarbonWeb can help! We are a Channel Partner and work with members of the community every day to solve their biggest problems. CRM functionality on monday has always been on of them, so we built our own for the community to utilize! Feel free to check out the CarbonCRM Suite within the monday.com marketplace to learn more.

I’d be happy to see if our team of in-house Solution Architect’s can help through a completely free consultation. If you would like to set up some time with me you can book something here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get going!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
